message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title $update-core

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #2f5fa8
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #7ea6e6
  ActorBorderColor #2f5fa8
  ActorBackgroundColor #7ea6e6
  BoxBorderColor #2f5fa8
  BoxBackgroundColor #7ea6e6
  ArrowColor #000000
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as HPI
participant "HPI MDM" as MDM

User -> App : Provide core details to be\nupdated
activate App

App -> HPI : POST<Endpoint>/Practitioner/$update-core
activate HPI

HPI -> HPI : Validate[]
HPI -> MDM : Request
activate MDM
MDM --> HPI
deactivate MDM

HPI --> App : Return updated Practitioner\nrecord
deactivate HPI

App -> User : Display updated Provider\ndetails to user
deactivate App

@enduml
```
